name: Flower in the Storm
original_name: ดอกหญ้าในพายุ
overview: It's a romantic drama about a girl who resents her dad because he left her and her mom and got remarried. So she aims to use her half-sister's fiancee as bait to get revenge, but love blossoms after they became close.

trailers.title: ดอกหญ้าในพายุ [Official Teaser] Ver.3
